LanguageData.Ammo_MonoArrow.label: Mono Arrow (Bodkin)
LanguageData.Ammo_MonoArrow.description: Specilized plasteel arrows that can be sharpened to a mono-molecular edge before being fired by a mono-longbow.
LanguageData.Ammo_MonoArrow_Broad.label: Mono Arrow (Broadhead)
LanguageData.Ammo_MonoArrow_Broad.description: Specilized plasteel arrows that can be sharpened to a mono-molecular edge before being fired by a mono-longbow.
LanguageData.Projectile_MonoArrow.label: mono-bodkin arrow
LanguageData.Projectile_MonoArrow_Broad.label: mono-broadhead arrow
